creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
FreeTypeWrapper.pm is A simple wrapper for FreeType.xs in
Shiozaki-san's X-TrueType server page:

http://hawk.ise.chuo-u.ac.jp/student/person/tshiozak/study/freebsd-at-random/x-tt/index-eng.html

Ports of X-TrueType server, XttXF86srv-*, have already been in x11/.
This port depend on misc/p5-FreeType.xs which I sent PR (now
pending/8020 ??) of.
